text:
You are working on beads issue flt-it8.24: "Bookmark provenance persistence" (P1 bug).

## Issue Details
Bookmark capture accepts selection and referrer but currently drops them, overloads content_url with the original URL, and later overwrites that field with an S3 key. Persist original URL in source_url, store selection/referrer in metadata, and preserve a stable provenance model through page-fetch processing.

## WORKTREE SETUP — RUN FIRST
Before doing anything else, create and enter an isolated worktree:
```bash
REPO_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"
BRANCH_NAME="worktree/bookmark-provenance"
WORKTREE_DIR="$REPO_ROOT/.claude/worktrees/$BRANCH_NAME"

if [ -d "$WORKTREE_DIR" ]; then
  echo "Worktree already exists, reusing"
else
  git worktree add "$WORKTREE_DIR" -b "$BRANCH_NAME"
fi

cd "$WORKTREE_DIR"
```
Verify you are in the right place:
```bash
echo "CWD: $(pwd)"
echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current)"
echo "$(pwd)" | grep -q '\.claude/worktrees/' && echo "WORKTREE VERIFIED" || echo "FATAL: NOT in a worktree"
```
If verification fails, STOP and report the error to the team lead.

ALL subsequent commands must run from this worktree directory.
NEVER cd back to the main repo directory. Commit and push ONLY on your worktree branch — never touch main.

When done, push your branch:
```bash
git push -u origin HEAD
```

## Instructions
1. Read CLAUDE.md and api/CLAUDE.md for project conventions
2. Find the bookmark capture flow: GraphQL mutation, resolver, item package, page fetch worker
3. Understand the current field usage (content_url being overloaded)
4. Implement provenance model:
   - Add source_url column if needed (migration)
   - Store original URL in source_url, keep content_url for S3 key
   - Store selection text and referrer in metadata JSONB
   - Preserve provenance through page-fetch worker processing
5. Update GraphQL schema if needed (run `make api-generate` after)
6. Write tests covering the full capture → fetch → storage flow
7. Follow Go conventions from CLAUDE.md

## Quality Gate (must pass before reporting done)
If you changed GraphQL schema files, run `make api-generate` first.
```bash
make api-test-unit && make api-lint
```

## Completion
When done, commit all changes, push your branch, and report back with:
- Summary of changes made
- Quality gate results (paste output)
- Any concerns or follow-up items discovered
